name: Sapporo Snow Festival
traditions: Massive snow and ice sculptures at Odori Park; snow slides; international snow sculpture contest; Susukino ice sculpture display.
historicalBackground: The Sapporo Snow Festival began in 1950 when local high school students built six snow statues in Odori Park. It has grown into Japan's largest winter event.
description: Japan's premier winter festival, where Sapporo's parks fill with towering snow sculptures and glittering ice art.
